title: Functions as Values, Signatures, and Composition · Evaluation Trace: First Class Functions
summary: Turn repeated validation branches into reusable transformations for an intake service. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp first class functions increment in a typed composition library with signature evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pass, store, return, and inspect callables while preserving clear input-output contracts.
Test determinism, input preservation, and order independence with changed data.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
